subject: feat(content): add spacers and line separators between text groups
body:
Per-group spacing controls in structured text mode: each text group
(Title & Tagline, Body, CTA, Footnote) can have spacers and line
separators above and below it. Spacers cycle through none/small/large
(0/0.5em/1.5em). Lines render as 60% width centered horizontal rules
in secondary theme color.

State stored as text[cellIndex].groupSpacing[groupId] using the existing
setText mechanism. AdCanvas renders decorations by iterating text groups
instead of a flat element list, inserting spacer divs and line elements
between groups that have visible content.

Tags: content, text, ui, canvas
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: content-text-controls
Semver: minor
